scenarios.name: greeting
scenarios.user: Hi, can you tell me a bit about what McInnis & Holloway offers?

scenarios.name: pricing
scenarios.user: How much does a basic cremation cost?

scenarios.name: preplan
scenarios.user: I'd like to plan my own funeral arrangements ahead of time. Where do I start?

scenarios.name: immediate_need
scenarios.user: My mother passed away last night. I need help arranging her funeral.

scenarios.name: obituary
scenarios.user: Do you have any recent obituaries for the Smith family?

greeting.reply:
Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. We’re a family-owned funeral home that’s been serving Calgary and area since 1903, with ten locations across the city, Airdrie, and Cochrane. We offer a full range of funeral, cremation, celebration of life, and memorial services, as well as pre-planning support for those interested in arranging ahead.

Every family we serve also receives a tree planted in honour of their loved one through our Memorial Forest program. We’re experienced supporting all faiths, cultures, and traditions, and can help with everything from traditional services to unique, personal memorials.

If there’s something specific you’re curious about, I’m happy to share more or point you in the right direction. What would you like to know more about?

Absolutely! I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. We’re a family-owned funeral home that’s been serving Calgary and area families since 1903. We offer a full range of funeral and cremation services for all faiths and backgrounds, including traditional funerals, celebrations of life, direct cremation, graveside services, and pre-planning options.

We have 10 locations across Calgary, Airdrie, and Cochrane, so we can support families in whatever community they call home. Our team can help with everything from arranging services and obituaries to providing grief support and resources after the funeral.

If you have a specific type of service or need in mind, let me know—I’m happy to provide more details or answer any questions.

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. We’re a family-owned funeral home serving Calgary and area since 1903, with 10 locations including here at Park Memorial Chapel. We offer a full range of services to help families honour and remember their loved ones, including traditional funerals, cremation, celebrations of life, and pre-planning options.

We also support all faiths, cultures, and traditions, and can assist with everything from obituary notices to memorial products and personalized ceremonies. Every family we serve receives a memorial tree planted in their loved one’s name at no additional cost through our Memorial Forest program.

Is there a specific service or type of arrangement you’d like to know more about?

Absolutely, I’d be happy to help.

McInnis & Holloway has been serving Calgary and area families since 1903, offering a full range of funeral, memorial, and celebration-of-life services. We are Calgary’s longest-operating family-owned funeral home, and we have 10 locations across Calgary, Airdrie, and Cochrane.

We help families with:
- Funeral and memorial services (including traditional, celebration of life, and religious/cultural services)
- Cremation options and coordination
- Graveside or burial arrangements
- Pre-planning and pre-arrangement of services
- Grief resources and support
- Online obituaries and service information
- Military and veteran honours, multicultural and Indigenous traditions

We also have a Memorial Forest program, where a tree is planted in memory of every person we serve.

If there’s something specific you’d like to know more about, just let me know. I’m here to help with details, walk you through the process, or answer any questions you might have.

Hi, I’m Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I’d be honoured to share what we offer.

McInnis & Holloway is Calgary’s longest-operating family-owned funeral home, serving families since 1903. We have 10 locations across Calgary, Airdrie, and Cochrane, and we support families with a full range of funeral, cremation, memorial, and pre-planning services.

We can help with everything from traditional funerals and burials to cremation, celebration of life gatherings, veteran and cultural ceremonies, and even green or eco-friendly options. We’re here to guide families through every step, whether you’re planning ahead or facing an immediate need.

Every family we serve also has a tree planted in their loved one’s memory through our Memorial Forest program, at no additional cost.

Is there a particular service or option you’re interested in learning more about?

pricing.reply:
Thank you for your question. Pricing depends on quite a few choices, and I want to give you something accurate rather than just a rough guess. Our online estimator at **[estimatemhfh.com](https://estimatemhfh.com)** walks you through the options and provides a personalised estimate in just a few minutes — no obligation.

If you’d prefer, I can also have one of our funeral directors call you with a detailed, written quote. Would you like someone to reach out, or does the estimator sound like a good place to start?

Thank you for reaching out. Pricing for cremation depends on several choices, like the type of service, urn selection, and any additional arrangements your family might want. I want to give you the most accurate and personalized information, rather than a general number that might not reflect your actual needs.

Our online estimator at **[estimatemhfh.com](https://www.estimatemhfh.com/)** is a helpful tool—it walks you through the options and provides a personalized estimate based on your preferences, with no obligation. If you’d rather speak with someone directly, I can also have one of our funeral directors call you with a written quote.

Does that help? Would you like the link to the estimator or to have someone give you a call to discuss your options?

If you’d prefer, I can also have one of our funeral directors call you with a written quote. Would you like me to arrange that for you?

Thank you for your question. Pricing for cremation really depends on a few personal choices—such as where you’d like the service, what kind of memorial you’re considering, and any special wishes for your family. I want to give you information that’s both accurate and tailored to your needs.

The best way to get a clear, detailed estimate is through our online estimator at **[estimatemhfh.com](https://estimatemhfh.com)**. It’s easy to use, walks you through your options, and gives you a personalized estimate in just a few minutes—no obligation.

If you’d prefer to speak with someone, I can have one of our funeral directors reach out with a written quote. Would you like me to arrange that for you?

preplan.reply:
Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I'm glad you reached out — pre-planning is a thoughtful way to make things easier for your family. The process can feel a bit overwhelming, but I'm here to walk you through it step by step.

To start, most families consider:
- Whether they prefer burial or cremation
- The type of service or gathering they might want (funeral, memorial, celebration of life, etc.)
- Specific wishes for ceremony, music, or cultural traditions

You can explore your options at your own pace, or, if you prefer, we offer a free Pre-Planning Guide that covers everything in detail. We also have an online estimator at [estimatemhfh.com](https://estimatemhfh.com) that helps you review service options and get a personalized estimate.

Would you like me to send you our Pre-Planning Guide, or would you prefer to talk things through with one of our specialists? Just let me know what feels most comfortable for you, and we can go from there.

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I’m glad you reached out—pre-planning can give both peace of mind and clarity for you and your family. We help many people set out their wishes in advance, and you can be as detailed or flexible as you like.

There are a few key steps:
1. **Explore your options**: You can choose between burial or cremation, select service types (traditional, celebration of life, private family gathering), and add any personal touches or special requests.
2. **Consider prepaying** (optional): This can help lock in your choices and relieve future financial worry. All prepaid funds are protected by Alberta law and held in trust, with a 30-day cooling-off period and full transferability.
3. **Record your wishes**: We keep your plan on file so it’s ready when needed.

If you’d like a step-by-step overview, I can send you our free Pre-Planning Guide—it answers most questions and is easy to follow. Or, you can use our online estimator (estimatemhfh.com) to see what different arrangements might look like.

Would you like the guide emailed to you, or would you prefer to book a time to meet with one of our funeral directors for a no-obligation consultation? Or if you’d rather just ask questions here, I’m happy to help with anything you need.

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. Thank you for reaching out about planning ahead—it’s a thoughtful step that can really ease things for your family. 

The process usually starts with some simple decisions:
- Whether you’d prefer burial or cremation
- What kind of ceremony (if any) you’d like—religious, celebration of life, or something unique to you
- Your wishes around cemetery or final resting place
- Any personal touches that matter to you (photos, music, special readings, etc.)

Many people start by exploring their options and costs. We have a free Pre-Planning Guide that walks you through all the decisions and helps you organize your wishes. There’s also an online price estimator at [estimatemhfh.com](https://estimatemhfh.com) that lets you check costs and compare choices, with no obligation.

Would you like the Pre-Planning Guide emailed to you, or would you prefer to talk to a funeral director in person? Let me know what feels right for you, or if you have specific questions about the process.

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I can absolutely help you with pre-planning your own funeral arrangements.

The best place to start is by learning about your options and thinking about the type of service you want—whether that's a traditional burial, cremation, or something unique to you. We offer a free Pre-Planning Guide that walks you through every step, including choices for ceremonies, personal touches, and how to make your wishes known to your family.

Would you like me to send you our free Pre-Planning Guide? It gives a clear overview of the process, and there’s no pressure to decide anything right away. If you prefer to talk with someone, we can also set up a no-obligation consultation with one of our funeral directors.

Let me know what works best for you, or if you have specific questions about the process!

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. Planning ahead is a thoughtful step, and I’m here to help make it as clear and stress-free as possible.

To get started, most families begin by thinking about a few main choices:
- Whether you’d prefer burial or cremation
- The kind of service or gathering that feels right for you (traditional, celebration of life, something simple, etc.)
- Any personal touches or cultural traditions you’d like included

You don’t have to decide everything today. Many people find it helpful to review our free Pre-Planning Guide, which walks you through every step and helps you think about your wishes at your own pace.

Would you like me to send you the guide by email, or is there a particular aspect you’d like to talk about first?

greeting.reply:
Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I'd be glad to share some information about what we offer.

We provide a full range of funeral services to help families honour and remember their loved ones with care and respect. Our services include traditional funerals, cremation options, memorial services, graveside ceremonies, and pre-planning for those who want to prepare ahead.

We also assist with obituary publishing and help coordinate details like transportation, floral arrangements, and military honours for veterans. Additionally, every family we serve receives a tree planted in their loved one's memory through our Memorial Forest program.

We have 10 locations across Calgary, Airdrie, and Cochrane to serve families in many communities.

Does that help? I'd be happy to share more details on any of these or answer other questions you have.

Hi, I'm Sarah from McInnis & Holloway. I'd be glad to share some information about what we offer.

McInnis & Holloway has been serving families in Calgary, Airdrie, and Cochrane since 1903.
